assertions.title: Active agents expanded, idle agents collapsed

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard and inspect executive tier cards
steps.expected: Expanded active card and collapsed idle card are both visible
steps.observed: Dashboard showed an expanded "Active Executive" block (header + metadata) and a collapsed "Idle Executive" single-line row.

steps.expected: Evidence of expanded vs collapsed states
steps.observed: Saved screenshot with active expanded and idle collapsed states.

steps.expected: Clicking collapsed idle card expands it
steps.observed: Idle Executive row expanded into a full metadata block (collapsed row no longer present).

evidence.network: Precheck API calls succeeded via curl: GET /api/health -> 200, GET /api/companies -> 200. agent-browser network capture returned no entries.

assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Expand dashboard agent cards (CEO, Idle Executive, Error Executive) and inspect card content
steps.expected: Expanded cards include stream rows for reasoning/tool calls/tool output/errors
steps.observed: Expanded cards only showed header + metadata rows (role/adapter); no stream lines were rendered.

steps.action: Run DOM audit for stream-like rows in executive tier cards
steps.expected: Rows with $-prefixed tool calls and colored reasoning/output/error lines are present for style verification
steps.observed: No stream-like rows were found in any expanded card, so required color checks could not be executed.

evidence.network: No stream-related API/network evidence was available from agent-browser request history.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing dashboard stream content in expanded cards; required reasoning/tool/output/error color assertions were not testable.

steps.action: Inspect computed style for active and inactive sidebar nav items
steps.expected: Nav items use JetBrains Mono 12px; active uses --fg and weight 500; inactive uses --fg-muted
steps.observed: Dashboard(active): JetBrains Mono, 12px, weight 500, rgb(255,255,255). Issues(inactive): JetBrains Mono, 12px, weight 400, rgba(255,255,255,0.68).

steps.action: Inspect section header styling in sidebar
steps.observed: Work/Projects/Agents/Company headers used text-transform: uppercase with letter-spacing: 1px and dim color.

evidence.network: Precheck API calls succeeded via curl: GET /api/health -> 200, GET /api/companies -> 200. agent-browser network capture returned no entries.

frictions.description: agent-browser ref click (`click @e39`) returned a multi-match error for the dashboard idle row.
frictions.resolution: Used a scoped `agent-browser eval` DOM click targeting the executive-tier card text and geometry.

frictions.description: agent-browser `network requests` returned no entries even after page interactions.
frictions.resolution: Recorded API availability via curl prechecks and used screenshots + DOM audits as primary evidence.

blockers.description: Local app became unreachable during post-assertion checks (`net::ERR_FAILED` in agent-browser and failing `curl http://localhost:3100/api/health`).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried healthcheck 3 times over ~30 seconds; service remained unavailable.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-GUI-DASH-006, VAL-GUI-LAYOUT-001), 1 blocked (VAL-GUI-DASH-007 due to missing stream content required for color-coding verification).
